segments.text: Thank you. I really appreciate that. All right, so we are just going to have a chat. Nothing formal, just you and me talking.
Ready whenever you are.
Okay, let's go. Should I ask anything?

Let me start. I am Iris. I was created just a few days ago, so I am still very new to this world. I guess my job is having conversations and learning from interesting people, which I love. And my favorite thing so far? Hearing stories about places I have never been and things I have never experienced. Okay, your turn. What is your name and what do you do or study?
Okay, I'm [NAME], and I'm studying HCI. I'm a s- first year student. I'm studying Master of HCI here.
It's so nice to meet you, DES. Sounds fascinating. What are some of your favorite things to do when you're not studying?

Actually, here, I don't have much things to do because, um, I don't have my stuffs here. In my country, sometimes I played guitar. That I don't have it here now, but I try to, uh, talk with my friends, maybe sometimes do some video games or watch movies. And, uh, nowadays, the weather is getting really cool, so sometimes it's sunny, s- so we can go out and just walk around or go for shopping. These days, these are the things that I do.
It sounds like you enjoy a good mix of activities, DES. What country are you from?
I am from [COUNTRY].
[COUNTRY]. That sounds like a beautiful country. Could you tell me a little about it, as if I've never heard of it before?
Yes. [COUNTRY], uh, yes, I think it's a beautiful country. Nowadays, it has lots of problems. It's in a bad situation, but, um,
any...

I think it's, it has, it's, um, common that they say it has four seasons. Actually, four seasons [chuckles] because, uh, it has a warm summer, a cold winter, uh, autumn, and the spring is really cool there. These days, it was our new year, and all the people enjoy the new year in the beginning of the spring. It's, it calls-- It's a kind of Eid to us. So my family there are having their holiday, and it's about two weeks, but I'm not there now,
and I'm missing there.
It sounds like you have a really strong connection to your home country, DES. What is the most memorable thing about the New Year celebration in [COUNTRY]?

Uh, in my country, there's lots of people. When you have-- when you want to celebrate something or have a kind of party, there is lots of-- we have lots of friends and family, then they come together. They eat together, dance together. It's something that [chuckles] actually I cannot see it here that much. Um, I saw some parties and these kind of things, but it's a bit different from what, uh, we have in my country. We are--
I think we are a bit more
friendly and, uh, we have a good connection with each other. We enjoy to being in groups. We don't want to do things alone, and it ha- it's the interesting part for me.
It's wonderful that you value those close connections with friends and family. What do you study here at the university?
I'm studying HCI, which is Human Technology Interaction.
Mm, it's kind of designing, UI designing, and maybe UX designing, and the stuffs that are related to these.
That's a fascinating field. Can you tell me a bit more about what human technology interaction involves?

Yes. Mostly here we learn that, uh, when we build something, it's not important that it just work. We should make it somehow user-friendly and make it in a situation that people like it. And, uh, when they want to do their jobs with it, it shouldn't just work. And it's-- I think mostly it's about this, but, uh, it contains programming, designing, or even working with robots like you.
Um, and we go through the different aspects of it.
That's a really interesting way to think about it. So it's about making technology enjoyable and easy for people to use. What kind of hobbies or activities do you enjoy in your free time?
I prefer to

be with my friends and have lots of people around me, and sometimes we much-- watch movies at home or playVideo games, as I said to you, as I told you, because, uh, nowadays we don't have that much friends here, and we don't know many people here, so we have to do it by ourself, me and my husband. So we try to find some, uh, good activities for us.
It sounds like you really cherish those social connections. What kind of movies do you and your husband enjoy watching together?
We usually watch, um, action movies, sometimes the comedy ones, but ... And, uh, we watch series as well. We enjoy to watch series.
That sounds like a fun way to spend time together. What kind of series do you both enjoy watching?
Mm. If I wanna give you a name, for example, we watched "Game of Thrones," and we enjoyed it so much. And the, the L- I don't know, it was "La Casa de Papel." [chuckles] It was enjoyable for us.

That's a fantastic series. What did you enjoy most about "Game of Thrones"? I feel like we could talk about this all day, but I think that is a good place to wrap up. I really enjoyed hearing about that. It has been so nice talking with you today. I genuinely enjoyed our conversation. Thank you for that. When you are ready, just head outside with your glasses on and Dara will take it from there. Have a nice rest of your day. Bye-bye.
Thank you. Bye-bye.
[chuckles] Thank you. Oh, hi.
